reasoning: XLK +0.78% and XLF +1.05% both leading while XLE flat at -0.02% = classic risk-on sector rotation. Two major sectors aligned >0.5% in same direction with XLF outperforming SPY (+1.05% vs +0.8%) indicating broad cyclical strength, not narrow tech-only move. Tech participating inline (+0.78% vs +0.8%). Energy flat confirms yield-driven growth rotation, not inflation signal. Sector internals paint strong bullish, broad-based picture heading into market open.
key_observations: XLK: +0.78% — solid tech leadership, growth sector performing well
XLF: +1.05% — strongest sector, financials outperforming, cyclical risk appetite
XLE: -0.02% — flat, no defensive rotation signal, confirms risk-on picture
Overall rotation: Risk-on with broad-based leadership from growth and financial sectors. Two major indices aligned >0.5% threshold with proportional SPY participation.
